sentence: 参加这次培训让我受益很多。
pinyin: Cānjiā zhè cì péixùn ràng wǒ shòuyì hěn duō.
english: Attending this training benefited me a lot.

meaning: 1. to exclude; 2. not including sth (when counting or listing); 3. exc
sentence: 周末除外，他每天都骑车上班。
pinyin: Zhōumò chúwài, tā měitiān dōu qí chē shàngbān.
english: Except for weekends, he bikes to work every day.

meaning: 1. to greet; 2. to pay respects to
pinyin: Tāmen jǔ bēi xiàng lǎoshī zhì jìng.
english: They raised their glasses to pay tribute to their teacher.

sentence: 公司为所有雇员提供医疗保险。
pinyin: Gōngsī wèi suǒyǒu gùyuán tígōng yīliáo bǎoxiǎn.
english: The company provides health insurance for all employees.

meaning: capital city of an autonomous region
sentence: 拉萨是西藏自治区的首府。
pinyin: Lāsà shì Xīzàng Zìzhìqū de shǒufǔ.
english: Lhasa is the capital of the Tibet Autonomous Region.
